reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.308(a)(6)(i) requires security incident procedures, which in a Kubernetes context can be supported by ensuring audit logging is enabled to capture security-related events, configuring audit policies to capture relevant security incidents, using admission controllers for detecting and preventing security incidents, and monitoring network policies for suspicious activities.
title: 164_308_a_6_i: 164.308(a)(6)(i) Security incident procedures
